channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [REGAL] Regal Entertainment: Blue Ocean & PACs raise stake to 20.24% via Rights Issue
item.description:
Blue Ocean Strategic Advisors Private Limited, along with persons acting in concert (PACs) Northern Lights Ventures Private Limited and Nisha Gupta, acquired additional equity shares in Regal Entertainment & Consultants Limited. This acquisition, executed through a Rights Issue, increased their combined shareholding from 1.50% to 20.24% of the company's total equity share capital. The disclosure was made pursuant to Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Post-Rights Issue, Regal Entertainment's equity share capital expanded from 30,72,100 shares to 89,09,090 shares.

  • Blue Ocean Strategic Advisors and PACs increased stake in Regal Entertainment.
  • Their combined shareholding rose from 1.50% to 20.24% post-acquisition.
  • The acquisition was executed via a Rights Issue.
  • This disclosure is mandated by SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
  • Regal Entertainment's equity capital expanded significantly after the Rights Issue.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Regal Entertainment & Consultants Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [LT] L&T Incorporates Wholly Owned Subsidiary Vyoma.AI
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Larsen & Toubro Limited (L&T) has incorporated a wholly owned subsidiary, Vyoma.AI Limited (VAL), on April 22, 2026. VAL's authorized and subscribed capital is ₹5,00,000. VAL will focus on establishing data centers and AI infrastructure to provide technology-enabled services. L&T has subscribed to 100% equity shares of VAL along with its nominee shareholders.

  • L&T incorporates Vyoma.AI Limited (VAL) as a wholly owned subsidiary on April 22, 2026.
  • VAL's authorized and subscribed capital is ₹5,00,000, fully subscribed by L&T.
  • VAL will establish data centers and AI infrastructure.
  • L&T holds 100% shareholding in VAL.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LARSEN & TOUBRO LTD. | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [KHAICHEM] Khaitan Chemicals: FY26 Audited Results Approved; Dividend Declared
item.description:
Khaitan Chemicals & Fertilizers Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. They re-appointed Mr. Utsav Khaitan as Joint Managing Director and appointed M.P. Turakhia & Associates as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27. Additionally, M/s APAS & Co. was appointed for internal audit for FY 2026-27. A final dividend of ₹0.05 per share (5% on face value of ₹1) for FY 2025-26 was recommended, subject to shareholder approval.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved with an unmodified opinion from the independent auditors.
  • Utsav Khaitan re-appointed as Joint Managing Director effective May 1, 2026, until April 30, 2029.
  • M.P. Turakhia & Associates appointed as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27, subject to shareholder ratification.
  • APAS & Co. appointed for internal audit for the financial year 2026-27.
  • Final dividend of ₹0.05 per share recommended for FY 2025-26, pending shareholder approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KHAITAN CHEMICALS & FERTILIZERS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PANORAMA] Panorama Studios Inflight LLP Executes Agreement with ChalChitra Mandalee LLP
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Panorama Studios Inflight LLP has entered into an agreement with ChalChitra Mandalee LLP to exclusively exploit the Airborne Rights for the cinematographic film "Krantijyoti Vidyalay Marathi Madhyam" worldwide, including India. The film stars Prajakta Koli, Sachin Khedekar, and Kshitee Jog, and is directed by Mr. Hemant Dhome.

  • Panorama Studios Inflight LLP secures exclusive Airborne Rights for a Marathi film.
  • The agreement covers worldwide exploitation, including India.
  • The film features notable actors Prajakta Koli and Sachin Khedekar.
  • ChalChitra Mandalee LLP is the counterparty in the agreement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Panorama Studios International Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [DABUR] Dabur India: Herjit S. Bhalla Joins as CEO - Indian Business
item.description:
Mr. Herjit S. Bhalla has joined Dabur India Ltd as Chief Executive Officer - Indian Business, effective April 23, 2026. He will report to Mr. Mohit Malhotra, Whole-time Director and Global Chief Executive Officer of the Company. This appointment is in the category of Senior Management Personnel.

  • Herjit S. Bhalla appointed CEO - Indian Business at Dabur India.
  • Appointment effective from April 23, 2026.
  • Bhalla will report to Mohit Malhotra, Whole-time Director and Global CEO.
  • The appointment falls under Senior Management Personnel category.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DABUR INDIA LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [KIMS] KIMS Enters MoU with Renova for Oncology Collaboration
item.description:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Ltd (KIMS) has entered into a non-commercial Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Dakshayani Healthcare Services Private Limited (Renova) for strategic clinical collaboration in oncology. Renova, a specialized oncology organization, will share its clinical expertise, knowledge, and best practices in cancer care with KIMS. The collaboration aims to strengthen healthcare delivery standards and enhance patient care outcomes in oncology services. Renova will enhance its brand positioning through association with KIMS, while KIMS will benefit from the collaborative development of clinical protocols and treatment methodologies.

  • KIMS partners with Renova for strategic clinical collaboration in oncology.
  • Renova will share its oncology expertise and best practices with KIMS.
  • The collaboration aims to improve healthcare delivery and patient care.
  • Renova seeks brand enhancement through association with KIMS.
  • KIMS will benefit from collaborative development of clinical protocols.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Ltd | Category: MoU

item.title: [ANTARIKSH] Antariksh Industries Shifts Registered Office to Gujarat
item.description:
Antariksh Industries Ltd. has shifted its registered office from Maharashtra to Gujarat, effective April 23, 2026. The Regional Director (Western Region-II) approved the shift on March 27, 2026, and the Registrar of Companies, Gujarat, has taken it on record. The new registered office is located at 5th Floor, 505, 3rd Eye Vision, Opp. Shivalik Plaza, Panjarapole, IIM, Ahmadabad City, Ahmedabad- 380015, Gujarat, India. Consequently, the Corporate Identification Number (CIN) has been changed from L74110MH1974PLC017806 to L74110GJ1974PLC176953.

  • Antariksh Industries' registered office moves from Maharashtra to Gujarat.
  • Regional Director approved the shift on March 27, 2026.
  • New CIN is L74110GJ1974PLC176953 after the office relocation.
  • The Registrar of Companies, Gujarat, has recorded the change.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Antariksh Industries Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [NATURO] Naturo Indiabull Appoints Mahendra Soni as Additional Director
item.description:
Naturo Indiabull Ltd has appointed Mr. Mahendra Soni (DIN: 11046273) as an additional non-executive & independent director, effective April 22, 2026. The appointment follows the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. Mr. Soni holds a B.COM degree from Rajasthan University. As of the appointment date, Mr. Soni does not hold any shares in the company.

  • Mahendra Soni appointed as an additional non-executive & independent director.
  • Appointment effective from April 22, 2026.
  • Soni's appointment is based on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee.
  • Mahendra Soni holds a B.COM degree from Rajasthan University.
  • Soni has no shareholding in the company as of the appointment date.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Naturo Indiabull Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [JAGANLAM] Jagan Lamps Buys Halogen Lamp Machinery from Tungsram, Hungary
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Jagan Lamps Ltd has entered into an arrangement to purchase machinery for manufacturing halogen lamps from Tungsram Operations Kft, Hungary. This acquisition aims to strengthen the company's manufacturing capabilities, improve operational efficiencies, and support growing market demand. The machinery will enable an annual production capacity of approximately 32.4 crore halogen bulbs. The acquisition is expected to be completed within 60 days and is not a related party transaction, nor does it require specific governmental or regulatory approvals.

  • Jagan Lamps acquires machinery from Tungsram to boost halogen lamp production.
  • The acquisition will enable an annual production capacity of 32.4 crore halogen bulbs.
  • The deal is expected to be completed within 60 days.
  • The acquisition is aimed at capacity expansion and strengthening manufacturing capabilities.
  • No specific governmental or regulatory approvals are required for the acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAGAN LAMPS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RAJESH] Rajesh Power FY26 Revenue Up 51.85% YoY to ₹1,627.94 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Rajesh Power Services Ltd announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported a 51.85% YoY increase in revenue from operations, reaching ₹1,627.94 Cr for FY26. EBITDA grew by 59.14% to ₹197.16 Cr, and profit after tax increased by 48.19% to ₹143.20 Cr. The company's strong performance was attributed to timely project execution, operational efficiencies, and a diversified order book.

  • Rajesh Power's FY26 revenue from operations reached ₹1,627.94 Cr, a 51.85% YoY increase.
  • FY26 EBITDA grew by 59.14% YoY to ₹197.16 Cr.
  • Profit after tax for FY26 increased by 48.19% YoY to ₹143.20 Cr.
  • H2FY26 revenue from operations stood at ₹990.12 Cr, up 30.45% YoY.
  • The company holds a 25.48% stake in HKRP Innovations Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajesh Power Services Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
